message:
fix(runtime): drop state lock before injecting task into scheduler and minor cleanups

RuntimeInner::spawn_with_cx held the state lock while calling
scheduler.inject_ready(), which could cause contention if the scheduler
needs to access state. Drop the guard after store_spawned_task() and before
inject_ready(). Also removes the dead `future` binding and its suppression.

RuntimeHandle::spawn_with_cx semicolon consistency fix.

Lab runtime: prefix unused error binding with underscore to silence warning
while preserving it for the debug log on the next line.

HTTP client: formatting-only changes to put() signature and
execute_single_streaming_with_proxy() call arguments.

Request region: minor formatting adjustment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
